name: Spaghetti Sauce with Turkey Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
For Sauce: Cook onion, green pepper, carrot, and celery in a covered 4-1/2-quart Dutch oven in a small amount of boiling water for 4 minutes or until tender. Drain. Stir in undrained canned tomatoes, tomato paste, Italian seasoning, sugar, garlic powder, and salt. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
Add meatballs; cover and simmer for 30 minutes. If necessary, uncover and simmer for an additional 10 to 15 minutes or until desired consistency, stirring occasionally. Serve over hot cooked pasta.
For Meatballs: In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except the turkey. Mix well and add the ground turkey; mix well. With wet hands, shape meat into 24 balls about 1 inch in diameter. Spray a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with nonstick spray. Place meatballs in prepared pan. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until no pink remains.
